name: aie-miami-wiki
description: AIE Wiki - read-only public AI Engineer Miami 2026 transcript wiki generated from the allowed Day 1/Day 2 transcripts, the public conference website, and clearly labeled public-web supporting context.
brandSubtitle: Public AI Engineer Miami 2026 transcript and research wiki.
primarySummary: Public AI Engineer Miami 2026 wiki inspired by Andrej Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern. YouTube audio was downloaded and transcribed with Whisper because direct transcripts were not available; the resulting transcript files, public conference website, and labeled public-web sources were compiled into a read-only interlinked markdown wiki.
sourceBoundary: transcripts + conference website + clearly labeled public-web supporting context
